scripts.dev:status: sh -c 'lsof -nP -sTCP:LISTEN -iTCP:55173 || true; ps -axo pid=,ppid=,stat=,command= | grep "$PWD/node_modules/.bin/vite" | grep -v grep || true'
scripts.dev:kill: sh -c 'ps -axo pid=,command= | while read pid command; do case "$command" in *"$PWD/node_modules/.bin/vite"*) test "$pid" = "$$" || kill "$pid" ;; esac; done; pids=$(lsof -tiTCP:55173 -sTCP:LISTEN); test -z "$pids" || kill $pids'
scripts.mobile:sync:dev: npm run build:dev && npx cap sync android
scripts.mobile:sync:prod: npm run build:prod && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:run:dev: npm run build:dev && npx cap run android
scripts.android:run:prod: npm run build:prod && npx cap run android
scripts.android:assembleDebug: npm run mobile:sync:dev && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:assembleProdDebug: npm run mobile:sync:prod && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:assembleRelease: npm run mobile:sync:prod && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.stdb:dev: PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" spacetime dev idle-wizard --server local --yes --module-path ./spacetimedb --module-bindings-path ./src/backend/spacetimedb/module_bindings --run "npm run dev"
